textByHash.05b98cfa7b768fd30b22dc6e2829dd1465efeada: Aha! The shipyard? Of course you aren't going to find anything there!
textByHash.25c68a8e317ff57b2b0a0e0f6590d3fd1fbbd288: The airships are being built just off the coast of Ape Atoll.
textByHash.3e8ae0c77e8b057d247dea37594ed668103c50fb: I am Assistant Le Smith. I used to work as a glider pilot, but they kicked me off.
textByHash.4f3e2a8c8775afee128a9675e4aab38ddf4ac5e8: Odd, I didn't think Awowogei was the type to work with humans...
textByHash.593d7a6cab1b9b1c333af40063ba5ef5176abc12: Me too, it's perfect conditions for my test flight.
textByHash.59a8230c37a90e462989aa905231bf9fd3802874: Yes? Wait... what are you doing here?
textByHash.5c7578ab53481c44e359891f2997c042bd3c27c7: Sorry, I don't have an amulet of monkey speak.
textByHash.78dd70833321559ed8ef48a9c9b4b4ac6df05257: Well you're not going to find him up here. I'm afraid I'm too busy to chat right now.
textByHash.7bcdb9e39608700a53e0cd6b2d8632aaa8f29a52: I've already said too much. Please, leave me be.
textByHash.8dd38a4ef0e49747dabe99f5ea615efe5953e524: Glough told me not to talk to anyone while I'm here.
textByHash.9258d30bd16a42fcc32a5afd9b2648368aa0ef28: Anyway, I have to get back to work. Let Awowogei know everything is on schedule.
textByHash.ba0b667439fc97ff9657dfc430ed2edc0665fa9e: I've already said too much, human. Please, leave me be.
textByHash.c118176b9af23f6dc2dfdd9f956f966ba66ffc2a: So what is it you want to know?
textByHash.da93119ba04339c52da902fe5e81d49a5a504684: They said I was too full of hot air.
textByHash.dfc29d4a456ce6bb389cae84a94d13367cef80c5: Do you want to use the balloon? Just so you know, some locations require special logs and high Firemaking skills.
textByHash.e0977bf72a80f520a94641dac6da7121384a570d: Do you want to use the balloon?
textByHash.e4afcfaede00ca4f0cb9b41188957262cad2e6e9: The fleet must be kept top secret... Agh! Forget I said anything.
textByHash.e84879a9eb27f23844d8e76ee4ee46f25fa9d920: But sir, it's only a matter of time before they... Agghh!
textByHash.f01257579b786fafa5816fdad14c3fd9b32d428a: Oh, right... What are you doing here?
textByHash.f480868b0952a241a7eabe86ce14335665627703: I'm afraid I have no idea what you're talking about... I'm just here on vacation!
textByHash.f5ad6f2a310003c8382162763c7d1267eb3e94cc: Sir, those experiments of yours are out of control back there, isn't there something you can do?
textByHash.fcdae23bae07cde55ff4904358f30672b7616191: Oh sorry, ignore that. I just meant it's a lovely day.
